message:
fix(sqlite): resolve clippy warnings for CI compliance

- Add clippy allow directives for FFI-specific lints in ffi.rs
  (unreadable_literal for standard hex constants)
- Add clippy allow directives for cast-related lints in types.rs
  and connection.rs (required for C FFI interop)
- Replace map().unwrap_or() with map_or() in types.rs
- Remove unused imports (c_void, std::ptr) in types.rs
- Convert close() to async fn syntax in connection.rs
- Add allow directives for result_large_err (error type defined
  in sqlmodel-core), borrow_as_ptr, if_not_else, implicit_clone,
  map_unwrap_or, and redundant_closure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
